name_en: M24044 Black M50280 Twist MM LV Bloom bag celebrates spring with delightful new details. It is crafted from grained Epi leather, featuring a stunning two-tone LV turnlock and a decorative chain handle adorned with delicate Monogram floral patterns. Removable leather smart straps and ample multi-pocket interior make this model both elegant and versatile. 23 x 17 x 9.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
